ddls:
CREATE TABLE "composers" (
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composer */,
  "composer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the composer */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the composer */,
  "death_year" INTEGER /* Death year of the composer (if applicable) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the composer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the composer */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the composer */,
  "influence" TEXT /* Significant influences on the composer */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards received by the composer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "music_pieces" (
  "piece_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music piece */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the music piece */,
  "year_composed" INTEGER /* Year the music piece was composed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the music piece */,
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the composer of the music piece */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of music piece */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the music piece */,
  "composition_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes or comments about the composition */,
  "score_url" TEXT /* URL of the score or sheet music */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("piece_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_music_pieces_composer_id FOREIGN KEY ("composer_id") REFERENCES composers ("composer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_music_pieces_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES music_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "music_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the music type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the music type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "piece_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the music piece being performed */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the performance */,
  "conductor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conductor of the performance */,
  "audience_size" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video recording of the performance */,
  "review_url" TEXT /* URL of a review or critique of the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_conductor_id FOREIGN KEY ("conductor_id") REFERENCES performers ("performer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_piece_id FOREIGN KEY ("piece_id") REFERENCES music_pieces ("piece_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performers" (
  "performer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performer */,
  "performer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the performer */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument(s) played by the performer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the performer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the performer */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards received by the performer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_pieces" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance */,
  "piece_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the music piece */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id", "piece_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_performers" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance */,
  "performer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the performer in the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id", "performer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "festivals" (
  "festival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each festival */,
  "festival_name" TEXT /* Name of the festival */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the festival */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the festival */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the festival */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the festival */,
  "ticket_url" TEXT /* URL for purchasing tickets */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors of the festival */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("festival_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "festival_performances" (
  "festival_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the festival */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("festival_id", "performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., composer, performer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information (e.g., browser, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
